title: NexusHub
intent: Central app registry, event bus governance, workflow orchestration, and integration contracts
requirements: apps module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
contracts module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
subscriptions module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
workflows module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
runs module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
health module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
